response.overview: Deiyanne Rate is a 1958 Sri Lankan film directed by L. S. Ramachandran. The film stars Senadheera Kuruppu, Punya Heendeniya, Dommie Jayawardena, Piyadasa Gunasekera,  Rohini Jayakody,  Jennie Winifrida, Alfred Edirimanne. Released on 1 May. Based on the novel byW. A. Silva. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Deiyanne Rate
